V0514_01_00_01_0.text:
You're brave for deciding to Duel me.
But not very smart.

V0514_01_00_02_0.text:
Sure, let's Duel.
It'll help me pass the time.

V0514_01_00_03_0.text: I hope you provide even the slightest bit of a challenge.

V0514_01_00_04_0.text:
Now let's begin.
Heh heh heh...

V0514_01_00_06_0.text:
You're feisty.
This should be fun.

V0514_01_00_07_0.text: I hope no one interrupts our Duel, Yuya.

V0514_01_00_08_0.text: You'll never defeat me or my Starving Venom.

V0514_01_00_10_0.text: I'll give you one last chance to take back your challenge.

V0514_01_00_11_0.text: This is the one Duel I've been looking forward to the most.

V0514_01_00_12_0.text: Whatever happens, you asked for this, Dennis.

V0514_01_00_14_0.text: You've beaten the elite - but never faced anyone like me.

V0514_03_00_00_0.text:
I can see you're trying your best.
But it's not enough.

V0514_03_00_01_0.text:
Are you sure you want to continue?
Okay - your mistake.

V0514_03_00_02_0.text: You'll learn that all your effort adds up to nothing!

V0514_03_00_04_0.text: I guess I can try a little harder.

V0514_03_00_05_0.text: Would you like to see how terrifying a Duel can be?

V0514_03_00_06_0.text:
Settle down.
You need to be more humble like me.

V0514_03_00_08_0.text: I've never lost a Duel, and I'm not starting now!

V0514_05_00_00_0.text: I wonder which will last longer - your spirit or your LP?

V0514_07_09_01_0.text: I flip over the card I Set!

V0514_10_00_01_0.text: It's finally time to make yourself known.

V0514_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position.

V0514_15_00_02_0.text: You can't do anything to stop me.

V0514_16_00_00_0.text: One final strike to finish you forever.

V0514_16_00_01_0.text: I can't wait to hear you scream.

V0514_21_00_00_0.text: It's more fun to watch you squirm than winning right away.

V0514_21_00_01_0.text:
You really think you can make a comeback?
Then show me.

V0514_21_00_02_0.text: I'd appreciate it if you'd try - just even a little bit.

V0514_21_00_04_0.text: That's it for now, but you won't like what I have in store.

V0514_21_00_06_0.text:
You're playing pretty well.
That's starting to annoy me.

V0514_21_00_07_0.text:
Whatever.
I'm still winning in the end.

V0514_21_00_08_0.text: I was willing to end you painlessly, but not anymore.

V0514_28_00_00_0.text:
Hahaha! Are you okay?
It looks like you can't even stand up.

V0514_28_00_01_0.text: That was a lot quicker than I thought it'd be.

V0514_28_00_03_0.text:
It's not my fault you lost.
You're the one without skills.

V0514_28_00_04_0.text:
It's always fun to win!
Hahahahahaha!

V0514_28_00_05_0.text:
That was great!
You're the best!

V0514_28_00_06_0.text:
I was going to turn down your challenge.
I'm glad I didn't.

V0514_28_00_06_1.text: No one's ever entertained me as much as you!

V0514_28_00_07_0.text:
I had... fun.
Perhaps for the first time in my life.

V0514_28_00_08_0.text: If I knew it'd be this much fun, we should've Dueled sooner!

V0514_28_00_09_0.text:
Ooh - not bad.
Impressive how none of you would quit.

V0514_28_00_11_0.text: I think my Dueling was more entertaining than yours, Dennis.

V0514_28_00_12_0.text:
How does it feel to get a failing grade?
Hahahaha!

V0514_29_00_00_0.text: I'll get you back for this - in my own way.

V0514_29_00_02_0.text: Did you come here just to annoy me!

V0514_29_00_04_0.text:
Humph...
I never want to see you again!

V0514_29_00_05_0.text: Losing to you feels like I lost against myself.

V0514_29_00_06_0.text: My previous foes were all bark and no bite - but not you.

V0514_33_00_00_0.text:
I'm going to give it my all.
Which is bad news for you.

V0514_33_00_01_0.text: I'll enjoy this Duel in my own way.

V0514_33_00_02_0.text: I'll be nice and end you quickly.

V0514_30_00_00_0.text:
You should surrender.
This is a Duel you can't win.

V0514_30_00_01_0.text: If you don't behave, I'll turn you into a card.

V0514_30_00_02_0.text: I'm impressed you've survived this far!

V0514_34_00_00_0.text: You're coming with me - whether you like it or not.

V0514_34_00_01_0.text: I'll use a Structure Deck instead of my usual Deck.

V0514_34_00_02_0.text: I know exactly what I'm doing.

V0514_34_00_03_0.text: Oh my! Looks like I drew a doozy!

V0514_34_00_04_0.text:
Am I a genius?
I mastered this Deck on my very first try.

V0514_34_00_05_0.text: This card is in my Deck because I put it there!

V0514_34_00_06_0.text: You think I'd play an effect without knowing what it does?

V0514_34_00_08_0.text: I always draw what I need!

V0514_34_00_09_0.text:
You said you were going to crush me.
Or were you all talk?

V0514_34_00_10_0.text:
Here it is!
This is going to be amazing!

V0514_34_00_11_0.text: I love how hard you try even when you know you can't win!

V0514_34_00_12_0.text: That monster again? Don't you know when to give up?

V0514_35_00_00_0.text: I've been called many names, but my name is Yuri.

V0514_36_00_00_0.text: Hurry up so I it'll be my turn again!

V0514_36_00_01_0.text: I'm warning you - don't mess up.

V0514_36_00_02_0.text: This is why I like Dueling by myself.

V0514_36_00_03_0.text: I do not give you permission to lose.

V0514_36_00_04_0.text: There's still something we can do, Yuya.

V0514_36_00_06_0.text: I know you're skilled enough to do something, Yuto.

V0514_36_00_07_0.text:
Just when it's getting fun...
Make sure I get another turn!

V0514_08_00_00_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Polymerization!

V0514_08_00_01_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Super Polymerization!

V0514_08_00_01_1.text: Super Polymerization can fuse monsters on both our fields!

V0514_08_00_01_2.text: And no effect can be activated in response.

V0514_08_00_02_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Super Polymerization!

V0514_08_00_03_0.text: Feast your eyes on a card more powerful than any other!

V0514_08_00_03_1.text: I activate the Spell Card, Ultra Polymerization!

V0514_08_00_04_0.text: I banish Ultra Polymerization from my Graveyard!

V0514_08_00_05_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Dowsing Fusion!

V0514_08_00_06_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Pendulum Fusion!

V0514_08_00_07_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Predaprime Fusion!

V0514_08_00_08_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Predaponics!

V0514_08_00_10_0.text: I activate the Equip Spell, Predapruning!

V0514_08_00_11_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Predapractice!

V0514_08_00_12_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Predaplast!

V0514_08_00_14_0.text: I banish Predaplanning from my Graveyard to use its effect!

V0514_08_00_15_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Predaplanet!

V0514_08_00_17_0.text: I banish Predaplanet from my Graveyard to use its effect!

V0514_08_00_18_0.text:
Heh heh...
I activate the Spell Card, Ancient Gear Catapult!

V0514_08_00_19_0.text: I activate Ancient Gear Catapult's effect from my Graveyard!

V0514_08_00_20_0.text: I activate the Continuous Spell, Ancient Gear Fortress!

V0514_08_00_21_0.text: Ancient Gear Fortress activates when it's destroyed!

V0514_08_00_22_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Ancient Gear Workshop!

V0514_08_00_23_0.text: I activate the Continuous Trap, Ancient Gear Reborn!

V0514_08_00_25_0.text: Starving Venemy Lethal Dose Dragon uses its Pendulum Effect!

V0514_08_00_26_0.text: Odd-Eyes Venom Dragon activates its Pendulum Effect!

V0514_08_00_27_0.text: I activate Predaplant Spider Orchid's Pendulum Effect!

V0514_08_00_28_0.text: Predaplant Bufolicula activates its Pendulum Effect!

V0514_09_00_00_0.text: Fusion Summoning Starving Venom activates its effect!

V0514_09_00_01_0.text: Starving Venom Fusion Dragon activates its effect!

V0514_09_00_02_0.text: Starving Venom Fusion Dragon activates when it's destroyed!

V0514_09_00_03_0.text: Greedy Venom Fusion Dragon activates its effect!

V0514_09_00_04_0.text: Greedy Venom's effect activates when it's destroyed!

V0514_09_00_05_0.text: I activate Starving Venom Predapower Fusion Dragon's effect!

V0514_09_00_06_0.text: Predapower's effect activates when it goes to the Graveyard!

V0514_09_00_08_0.text: I activate Starving Venemy Lethal Dose Dragon's effect!

V0514_09_00_09_0.text: I activate Odd-Eyes Venom Dragon's effect!

V0514_09_00_10_0.text: Fusion Summoning Triphyoverutum lets it use this effect!

V0514_09_00_11_0.text: Since you have a Predator Counter, I can revive this card!

V0514_09_00_14_0.text: Ambulomelides's effect activates when it's Fusion Summoned!

V0514_09_00_16_0.text: I activate Heliamphorhynchus's effect from my hand!

V0514_09_00_17_0.text: Heliamphorhynchus's effect activates when it's destroyed!

V0514_09_00_18_0.text: Banksiogre's effect activates when it goes to the Graveyard!

V0514_09_00_19_0.text: I banish Drosophyllum Hydra from my Graveyard!

V0514_09_00_20_0.text: Moray Nepenthes activates when it destroys a monster!

V0514_09_00_21_0.text: Moray Nepenthes has a monster equipped, so it can do this!

V0514_09_00_23_0.text: Spinodionaea battled a monster with equal or lower Level!

V0514_09_00_24_0.text: By Summoning Ophrys Scorpio, its effect activates!

V0514_09_00_25_0.text: A Predaplant's effect Special Summoned Darlingtonia Cobra!

V0514_09_00_26_0.text: Pterapenthes's effect activates when it deals damage!

V0514_09_00_28_0.text: I send Squid Drosera from my hand to the Graveyard!

V0514_09_00_29_0.text: Squid Drosera's effect activates when it leaves the field!

V0514_09_00_31_0.text: Predaplant Flytrap's effect activates when it battles!

V0514_09_00_32_0.text: I use Chlamydosundew's effect to Fusion Summon!

V0514_09_00_33_0.text: I banish Cordyceps from my Graveyard to use its effect!

V0514_09_00_34_0.text: Byblisp's effect activates when it's sent to the Graveyard!

V0514_09_00_35_0.text: Predaplant Byblisp activates its effect from the Graveyard!

V0514_09_00_36_0.text: Predaplant Sarraceniant's effect activates from my hand!

V0514_09_00_37_0.text: Sarraceniant's effect activates when it battles!

V0514_09_00_39_0.text: Triantis's effect activates when it's used to Fusion Summon!

V0514_09_00_40_0.text: Summoning Spider Orchid this turn lets me use its effect!

V0514_09_00_41_0.text: Bufolicula activates when it's used to Fusion Summon!

V0514_09_00_43_0.text: I pay LP to activate Verte Anaconda's effect!

V0514_09_00_44_0.text: I activate  Clear Wing Synchro Dragon's effect!

V0514_09_00_45_0.text: Ultimate Ancient Gear Golem activates when it's destroyed!

V0514_09_00_46_0.text: Ancient Gear Reactor Dragon activates its effect!

V0514_09_00_49_0.text: It says this Wyvern can use its effect when it's Summoned!

V0514_09_00_50_0.text: Ancient Gear Gadget activates its effect!

V0514_09_00_51_0.text: Whoa! Hunting Hound can deal damage when it's Summoned!

V0514_09_00_52_0.text: I activate Ancient Gear Hunting Hound's effect!

V0514_37_00_00_0.text: My plants have never been more ravenous!

V0514_37_00_00_1.text: I'll graft these together to create a botanical nightmare!

V0514_13_00_00_0.text: You're no match for this toxic predator!

V0514_37_00_01_0.text: I combine voracious venom with a carnivorous plant!

V0514_37_00_02_0.text: My flora is ready to feast!

V0514_37_00_02_1.text: I'll graft these together to sprout the fiercest of fangs!

V0514_13_00_02_0.text: The poisonous dragon that devours all!

V0514_13_00_02_1.text:
Level 10!
Starving Venom Predapower Fusion Dragon!

V0514_37_00_03_0.text: Poison mixes with poison to make this monster dangerous!

V0514_37_00_04_0.text:
Mixing them is dangerous!
And too much results in chaos!

V0514_13_00_04_0.text:
Come forth!
The fusion of three ultimate dragons!

V0514_37_00_05_0.text: The power of Pendulum combines with the forces of Fusion!

V0514_13_00_25_0.text: The Pendulum Monster, Predaplant Spider Orchid!

V0514_37_00_06_0.text: Beat your wings to whip up a whirlwind of destruction!

V0514_37_00_07_0.text: Unite the wisdom and savagery of past ages into a behemoth!

V0514_13_00_31_0.text:
Let's go!
Level 9 Ancient Gear Reactor Dragon!

V0514_13_00_32_0.text: Here comes Level 7 Ancient Gear Hydra!

V0514_13_00_37_0.text: I Special Summon an Ancient Gear Token!

V0514_19_00_02_0.text:
Starving Venom Predapower Fusion Dragon!
Attack!

V0514_19_00_04_0.text: Starving Venemy Lethal Dose Dragon attacks!

V0514_19_00_36_0.text: Sink your fangs, Ancient Gear Hunting Hound!

V0514_44_00_02_0.text: Only one will rule the Duel...

V0514_44_00_03_0.text: In the ultimate fusion of monsters and mayhem!
